svg.title: Self-Healing Playwright Framework - Execution Flow
svg.desc: End-to-end flow from test spec through static healing, discovery strategies, reporting, and dashboard ingest.
svg.text: Execution flow - test run through healing to dashboard

g.text: composeDiscoveryStrategies | merge by query key | highest score wins
scoreCandidateViability | try action on live locator | recordHistoryOutcome
Pass/fail trends | duration | embedded HTML report (has_html_report_zip)

svg.text: Nova Retail SPA - silent login in showcases, demo toasts on /app/products
Default auto-heal discovery: seed + dom-scan (disable DOM scan: AUTO_HEAL_DOM_SCAN=0)
Dashboard ingest is non-blocking in CI (continue-on-error)
Open: docs/Self-Healing-Framework-Flow-Diagram.svg | Regenerate deck: npm run deck:technical
